title: Bernardia celastrinea
taxonomy: Bernardia celastrinea is a species of plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a member of the order Celastrales and is native to Mexico. The plant is further classified into the family Celastraceae, which is part of the larger clade of Rosids. Within the family Celastraceae, Bernardia celastrinea is placed in the genus Bernardia, making it a specific species within this genus. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different plant species.

Its extracts have been studied for potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
